name: @lelenaic/tagstrip
description: A library for one-line barcodes-like encoded data made for Dymo

scripts.test: vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.node.config.js && vitest run --config vitest.browser-e2e.config.js
scripts.test:coverage: yarn test:core-coverage && yarn test:scanner-coverage && yarn test:e2e-coverage && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/browser coverage-reports/merged/browser.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/node coverage-reports/merged/node.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/browser-e2e coverage-reports/merged/browser-e2e.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/merged --out coverage-reports/merged/coverage.json && npx nyc report --temp-dir coverage-reports/merged --reporter=text --reporter=html --report-dir coverage-reports/merged
scripts.demo: yarn build && node generate-ssl.js && node serve.js
